# Build & Deploy

Note: If you're not Brian, don't try this.

## Modify version

Change the version in pytest_skip_slow.py

## Update Changelog

Update CHANGELOG.md

## Tag

```
$ git tag -a 1.1.0 -m 'some message'
$ git push --tags
```

## Release

Go to [new release](https://github.com/okken/pytest-skip-slow/releases/new) and manually create one based on the above tag.
